We're hiring an Application Security Engineer to help secure our application stack and developer tooling. You'll partner with engineering teams across the company to identify, triage, and remediate security issues.

What you'll do

  • Lead threat modeling on new services
  • Build secure-by-default tooling for developers
  • Triage incoming bug bounty reports
  • Drive secure SDLC adoption across teams

What we look for

  • Hands-on AppSec experience (SAST, code review, threat modeling)
  • Familiarity with cloud-native development
